message.content:
I need to understand the current clipboard/copy patterns in this codebase. Please:

1. Read src/utils/clipboard.ts if it exists
2. Read src/components/action_panel/actions/ directory contents if they exist
3. Search for all uses of `navigator.clipboard` or `clipboard.writeText` across all .tsx files
4. Search for all HUD-related copy patterns (e.g. "Copied" HUD messages) across all views
5. Read the following files to understand current copy implementations:
   - src/components/clipboard_history/clipboard_history_view.tsx (look for copy handler)
   - src/components/snippet_manager/snippet_manager_view.tsx (look for copy handler)
   - src/components/emoji_picker/emoji_picker_view.tsx (look for copy handler)
   - src/components/file_search/file_search_view.tsx (look for copy handler)
   - src/components/color_picker/color_picker_view.tsx (look for copy handler)
   - src/App.tsx (look for copy handler)
6. Read src/components/action_panel/actions_dropdown.tsx to understand the DropdownAction type
7. Read src/hooks/use_hud.ts to understand HUD hook API

Report back all findings: the exact copy patterns used, HUD icon components, DropdownAction interface shape, and what needs to be unified.
